name: scenario_GridLayout_resize
description: Resize the grid via REST while the pipeline is running and verify it reallocates cleanly under memory pressure. Lowers to 128x64 (release memory), increases to 128x128 (heaviest config: mirror + LUT). Each measured step captures tick/FPS/heap so the live runner reports the degrade behaviour.

steps.name: reset-mirrorX
steps.description: Make sure the mirror is enabled on X before measuring (the test assumes the heaviest LUT path).

steps.name: reset-mirrorY
steps.description: Make sure the mirror is enabled on Y before measuring.

steps.name: size-128x128
steps.description: Set grid height to 128 (alongside default width 128). Measures the heaviest config as the baseline for the next two steps.

steps.name: shrink-to-128x64
steps.description: Shrink to 128x64. Measured: FPS must stay within 20% of the baseline (proves the pipeline reallocs cleanly and there's no leak path).

steps.name: grow-to-128x128
steps.description: Grow back to 128x128. Measured: confirms the heap can return to the heavy baseline after a shrink.
